zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthew Cartwright於1715年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯聖 馬雷斯 帕里什時，他的父親Peter Cartwright29歲，母親Judith SLYE10歲。他於從1745年1月到1745年12月與Teresia Sarah Miller在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯聖 馬雷斯 帕里什結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1772年8月10日在美國維吉尼亞州費爾法克斯費爾法克斯享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthew Cartwright于1715年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯聖 馬雷斯 帕里什时，他的父亲Peter Cartwright29岁，母亲Judith SLYE10岁。他于从1745年1月到1745年12月与Teresia Sarah Miller在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯聖 馬雷斯 帕里什结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1772年8月10日在美国弗吉尼亚州費爾法克斯費爾法克斯享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cartwright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Gathright
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Cartwright  .

variants.name: Cartright
meanings: Probably also a variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Courtright
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Kortrijk: habitational name from the city of Kortrijk in Flanders, in French known as Courtrai. Compare Cartwright , Cortright , Courtwright , Curtright , Cutright , and Kortright .
Perhaps also an altered form of English   Cartwright  .

History: The progenitors of the (majority of the) Courtrights (and Cortrights, Kortrights, etc.) were the brothers Jan and Michiel Bastiansen van Kortryk from Leerdam in the Netherlands, who arrived with their families to New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY) in 1663. The descendants of one or another brother also bear the surnames Kortright, Kortwright, Cortright, Co(u)rtwright, Cartwright, and Cu(r)tright.

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthew Cartwright was born in 1715, in St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America, his father, Peter Cartwright, was 29 and his mother, Judith SLYE, was 10. He married Teresia Sarah Miller from January 1745 to December 1745, in St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 10 August 1772, in Fairfax, Fairfax, Virginia, United States, at the age of 57.

Il a épousé Teresia Sarah Miller du janvier 1745 au décembre 1745, à St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 août 1772, à Fairfax, Fairfax, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Matthew Cartwright(이)가 1715년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 찰스 스트 마이스 파리시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Cartwright(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith SLYE(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1745년 1월 부터 1745년 12월 까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 찰스 스트 마이스 파리시에서 Teresia Sarah Miller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1772년 8월 10일 미국 버지니아 주 파어파스 파어파스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, Brit: ст мэрис пэриш, чарльс, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthew Cartwright родился в 1715 г. в местности ст мэрис пэриш, чарльс, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Peter Cartwright было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith SLYE, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Teresia Sarah Miller с январь 1745 по декабрь 1745 в местности ст мэрис пэриш, чарльс, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 августа 1772 г. в местности феирфакс, феирфакс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 57 лет.
